articles.title: Bob Cousy Pass dedicated in Worcester in honor of Celtics legend
articles.description:
The event took place at the Hart Center at Holy Cross.

The post Bob Cousy Pass dedicated in Worcester in honor of Celtics legend appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bob Cousy Pass was dedicated on July 17 at the Hart Center in Worcester.
The dedication honors Celtics legend Bob Cousy, a key figure in Boston sports history.
This event strengthens community ties and celebrates local sports heritage for Boston residents.

articles.title: Popular Nantucket pizzeria Pi is for sale for $12.5 million
articles.description:
The owners of Pi Pizzeria are retiring after 25 years, putting the beloved Nantucket restaurant, its commercial property, and staff housing on the market.

The post Popular Nantucket pizzeria Pi is for sale for $12.5 million appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Pi Pizzeria in Nantucket is listed for sale at $12.5 million.
Owners are retiring after 25 years of operating the restaurant.
Potential loss of a beloved dining spot for Boston residents visiting Nantucket.
